meta.disclaimer: DEMO / PLACEHOLDER DATA ONLY. Values are generated with simple illustrative formulas for UI and architecture demonstration. They are NOT verified against IEC 60364-5-52, TNB/ST requirements, or manufacturer datasheets. Replace this file with your own audited cable database (e.g. the Malaysia LV Cable Sizing Engineering Database) before using this app for real design work.
